characters.appearance: A South Indian woman in her late 20s or early 30s with a warm, medium complexion. She has long, dark, wavy hair parted in the middle, and a red bindi on her forehead. She has a friendly, smiling expression.
characters.wardrobe: A traditional saree with a royal blue body, a turquoise green inner layer, and an orange and gold patterned border (pallu). She wears gold-colored traditional bell-shaped earrings (jhumkas).

characters.appearance: A young South Asian woman in her early 20s with a fair complexion and a slim build. She has long, straight, dark brown hair parted on the side. She has delicate facial features.
characters.wardrobe: A casual dark navy blue sleeveless top and dark blue jeans.
characters.demeanor: Initially focused and learning, then becomes friendly, confident, and helpful when explaining the app.

characters.appearance: A young South Asian man in his early 20s with a medium build and a light brown complexion. He has short, styled black hair and wears black-rimmed glasses. He has a light beard and mustache.
characters.wardrobe: A casual, short-sleeved, light brown or beige t-shirt with some small text on the chest, paired with dark jeans.

characters.appearance: A woman in her mid-20s with a fair complexion. She has long, straight, dark brown hair parted in the middle. She has a neutral, professional expression.
characters.wardrobe: A light purple or lavender-colored turtleneck top.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character B says: I Pooja. I Delhi. I doing hard working person.

AI Voice says: मेरा नाम पूजा है। मैं दिल्ली से हूँ और मैं बहुत मेहनत करती हूँ। [My name is Pooja. I am from Delhi and I work very hard.]

Character B says: My name is Pooja, I am from Delhi, I am a hardworking person.

AI Voice says: Very good.
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer by showing a relatable struggle with spoken English.
- Demonstrates the app's core feature: translating native thoughts into correct English sentences.
- Establishes a supportive, encouraging learning environment.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
I Pooja
I Delhi
I doing hard working person.
Mera naam Pooja hai.
Main Delhi se hoon
aur main bahut mehnat
karti hoon.
My name is Pooja,
I am from Delhi,
I am a hardworking person.
Very good.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character C says: Hi, मैंने अभी आपको English practice करते हुए देखा। Actually मेरी English भी काफी weak है। क्या मैं इस app से English सीख सकता हूँ? [Hi, I just saw you practicing English. Actually, my English is also quite weak. Can I learn English from this app?]

Character B says: मेरी English भी बहुत weak थी, इसलिए मैं रोज़ Supernova app पर English practice करती हूँ। [My English was also very weak, that's why I practice English daily on the Supernova app.]

Character C says: Supernova app? वो क्या है? [Supernova app? What is that?]

Character B says: ये एक AI English learning app है। [This is an AI English learning app.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Introduces the target audience's pain point through a relatable bystander.
- Positions the user as a confident advocate for the brand.
- Naturally introduces the brand name 'Supernova' as the solution.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Hi,
maine abhi aapko English
practice karte hue dekha.
Actually meri English bhi kaafi weak hai
kya main is app se English seekh sakta hoon?
Meri English bhi
bahut weak thi,
isliye main roz
Supernova app par
English practice karti hoon.
Supernova app?
Ye ek AI English learning app hai.

scenes.supernova_script: Character B says: यहाँ AI tutors आपको real-life situations के लिए English practice कराते हैं, और बिना डरे बोलना सिखाते हैं। [Here, AI tutors make you practice English for real-life situations, and teach you to speak without fear.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Visually proves the app's interface is clean and easy to use.
- Highlights the AI tutor feature and real-world application.
- Builds trust by showing exactly what the user will experience.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Ye ek AI English learning app hai.
Yahan AI tutors aapko real-life situations
ke liye English practice karate hain
aur bina dare bolna sikhate hain.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character B says: वो भी बिना किसी judgment के, बिल्कुल एक दोस्त की तरह। [That too without any judgment, just like a friend.]

Character C says: लेकिन इसमें बहुत time लगता होगा ना? [But this must take a lot of time, right?]

Character B says: नहीं, बस रोज़ 15-20 minutes practice करो। Interview हो या shopping, आप confidence के साथ English बोल पाओगे। मेरे काफी friends को इससे बहुत help मिली है। [No, just practice for 15-20 minutes daily. Whether it's an interview or shopping, you will be able to speak English with confidence. Many of my friends have found it very helpful.]

Character C says: पर ये काफी महंगा होगा? [But this must be quite expensive?]

Character B says: बिल्कुल नहीं, ये बहुत affordable है। आप खुद try करके देख सकते हो। [Not at all, it is very affordable. You can try it out yourself.]

Character C says: मुझे ये पहले क्यों नहीं पता था? मैं अभी Supernova app download करता हूँ। Thank you. [Why didn't I know this before? I will download the Supernova app right now. Thank you.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Overcomes common objections: fear of judgment, time commitment, and cost.
- Sets realistic expectations (daily practice over instant fluency).
- Ends with a strong, clear call to action to download the app.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Wo bhi bina kisi judgment ke
bilkul ek dost ki tarah.
Lekin isme bahut time
lagta hoga na?
Nahi, bas roz 15-20 minutes
practice karo.
Interview ho ya shopping
aap confidence ke saath
English bol paoge.
Par ye kaafi
mahenga hoga?
Bilkul nahi,
ye bahut affordable hai.
Mujhe ye pehle kyun nahi pata tha?
Main abhi Supernova app
download karta hoon.
Thank you.
